task_completion.description: Read the takeoff schedule text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'takeoff_schedule.txt' from the Desktop, showing the target deflection angles.

task_completion.description: Open the baseline transport model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is open and displays the loaded 'transport_baseline.vsp3' aircraft geometry.

task_completion.description: Set the main wing sub-surface deflections to target angles
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP parameter dialogs for the main wing's sub-surfaces showing the angles set to: FlapInboard = 20.0, FlapOutboard = 15.0, and Slat = -25.0.

task_completion.description: Set the horizontal tail sub-surface deflection to target angle
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP parameter dialogs for the horizontal tail's sub-surfaces showing the Elevator angle set to -8.0.

task_completion.description: Save the deflected model as transport_takeoff.vsp3
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog or a file manager/terminal window showing 'transport_takeoff.vsp3' successfully saved in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory.

task_completion.description: Export the outer mold line geometry as an STL mesh
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenVSP Export dialog or a file manager/terminal window showing 'takeoff_mesh.stl' successfully saved in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenVSP graphical user interface to modify the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenVSP menus and parameter windows, rather than just text-editing the .vsp3 XML file directly.

integrity.description: The STL file was genuinely exported from OpenVSP
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the OpenVSP export functionality (e.g., File -> Export -> STL), rather than creating a dummy file using terminal commands like 'touch'.

integrity.description: The modified VSP3 file was saved from within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using OpenVSP's Save/Save As feature after making modifications, rather than just copying the baseline file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target deflections to verify in OpenVSP: FlapInboard = 20.0, FlapOutboard = 15.0, Slat = -25.0, Elevator = -8.0. Expected VSP3 save path: /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/transport_takeoff.vsp3. Expected STL export path: /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/takeoff_mesh.stl.
